title: Digital Enablement & Personal Security
description: Guidance on safe tech use (email, social media), device protection, secure practices, backups, and accessibility setup for individuals.

title: Remote IT Support (Individual)
description: Remote assistance for troubleshooting computer problems, software issues, and connectivity for personal users.

title: System Optimization (Standard & Gamer)
description: OS performance tuning for improved speed and responsiveness in daily use and gaming.

title: Cybersecurity Consulting (Blue Team)
description: Defensive security services: Threat Intel integration, SIEM configuration, Incident Response readiness, and Forensics preparation.

title: IT Infrastructure Security & Compliance
description: Auditing, hardening, and automating IT infrastructure security (on-prem/cloud) aligned with best practices and compliance (LGPD).

title: Automation for Security & Infrastructure
description: Custom script and tool development to improve efficiency in security operations and IT infrastructure management.

title: Static Website Development
description: Building fast, secure, modern static websites (HTML/CSS/JS) for portfolios, landing pages, etc., including responsive design.

title: Website Maintenance & Updates
description: Ongoing support for website updates, security checks, performance monitoring, and content adjustments.
